pleiodbr 0.1.0

GWAS query

Source: R/gwas.R
gwas.Rd

Returns association statistics for all variants for a single trait.

Usage

gwas(db, trait_id)

Arguments

db

A pleiodb object from open_pleiodb().

trait_id

OpenGWAS trait ID string.

Value

A tibble with columns variant_id, trait_id, z, beta, se, pval, eaf, n, imputed. Rows with z = NA are dropped.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
db  <- open_pleiodb("/path/to/main.pleiodb")
gwas(db, "ukb-b-19953")
} # }
